title: Allow streaming on some varlink container methods
body:
The following methods should support streaming requests from the client:

* GetContainerLogs

A reference for a python stream implementation can be found here:

https://github.com/varlink/python/blob/master/varlink/tests/test_orgexamplemore.py#L29-L42

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: The only one of these I see as interesting is logs, not sure why we wouldn't tell the client side it is responsible for the other two calls.
@rhatdan is that a firm requirement? if so, say so and i will update
I think there would be less chance of a support headache that way, and we can always add them in the future if users want it.

LGTM
@jwhonce Does this work for you?  If yes lets merge.

:pushpin: Commit b0d930e has been approved by `mheon`
